title: Kerala Trip
subtitle: Munnar · Thekkady · Alleppey Backwaters
inclusions: Both way SL Train Tickets (3AC upgrade available)
AC Tempo Traveller / Bus for local sightseeing

itinerary.title: Board Train at Panvel
itinerary.description: Board the NZM-ERS SF Express (22656) at Panvel at 11:00 PM. Settle in and get comfortable for the overnight train journey to Kerala.

itinerary.title: Train Journey
itinerary.description: Enjoy the scenic train journey crossing the Western Ghats. Relax, bond with fellow travellers and look forward to Kerala.
itinerary.meals: No Meals (train food at own cost)

itinerary.title: Arrive Ernakulam → Munnar
itinerary.description: Arrive Ernakulam at 3:00 AM. After freshening up, depart for Munnar. En route visit Cheeyapara Waterfalls and Valara Waterfalls. Check in to hotel. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Full-day sightseeing in Munnar — Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Blossom Hydel Park, and Tea Museum. Return to hotel. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Thekkady Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Early morning breakfast and check out. Visit Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary (boating at own cost), optional Elephant Ride (own cost), and Shopping at Local Market. Return to hotel. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.description: Early morning breakfast and check out. Check in at Private Houseboat. Leisure time on the houseboat, Lunch on Houseboat. Spend a relaxed evening cruising the backwaters. Dinner and overnight stay on Houseboat.

itinerary.title: Departure for Mumbai
itinerary.description: Early morning breakfast. Check out from Houseboat. Catch the return train from Alleppey at 10:30 AM (for Mumbaikars). Overnight train journey back home.

itinerary.title: Reach Mumbai
itinerary.description: Reach Mumbai by 05:00 PM. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

itinerary.title: Board Train at LTT Mumbai
itinerary.description: Board Matsyagandha Express (12619) at LTT at 2:00 PM. Overnight journey to Murudeshwar.

itinerary.title: Arrive Murudeshwar → Gokarna
itinerary.description: Arrive Murudeshwar at 5:00 AM. After freshening up, visit Apsarkonda Waterfall, Mirjan Fort, Mahabaleshwara Temple, and Gokarna Beach. Check in and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Murudeshwar Temple & Backwaters
itinerary.description: Visit the iconic Murudeshwar Temple with the world's 2nd tallest Shiva statue. Enjoy Honnavar Backwater Boating. Spend the evening at the beach watching the sunset. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Yana Caves & Vibhuti Waterfall
itinerary.description: Morning visit to the mystical Yana Caves — unique black crystalline limestone rock formations. Visit Vibhuti Waterfall. Board the return train at 4:00 PM.

itinerary.title: Arrive Mumbai
itinerary.description: Arrive Mumbai in the morning. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

title: Kedarnath – Badrinath
subtitle: Haridwar · Kedarnath Trek · Badrinath · Rishikesh
inclusions: Mumbai to Mumbai SL Train Tickets (3AC upgrade available)
Non-AC Tempo Traveller for local sightseeing
advisory: Age 16–50 required. Physical fitness mandatory for 21km Kedarnath trek. Dham Yatra rules apply. Alternative options (Horse/Helicopter/Doli) available at own cost.

travel.arrival: Reach Mumbai at 08:00 AM, 06 Oct 2026 (Punjab Mail 12138)

itinerary.title: Board Train at Bandra
itinerary.description: Board Bandra Haridwar Express (19019) at Bandra Terminus at 11:00 PM. Overnight journey to Haridwar.

itinerary.title: Train Journey
itinerary.description: Continue train journey to Haridwar. Relax and prepare for the spiritual journey ahead.
itinerary.meals: No Meals (train food at own cost)

itinerary.title: Haridwar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive Haridwar at 7:45 AM. Take a holy dip at Har-ki-Pauri. Sightseeing in Haridwar. Witness the mesmerising Ganga Aarti in the evening. Check in and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Haridwar → Sonprayag
itinerary.description: Early morning check out at 5:00 AM. Start the 12-hour bus journey to Sonprayag. En route visit Devprayag — the sacred confluence of Alaknanda and Bhagirathi rivers. Dinner and overnight stay in Sonprayag.

itinerary.title: Sonprayag → Kedarnath Trek
itinerary.description: Check out at 4:00 AM. Local Jeep to Gauri-Kund (base of trek). Begin the 21km trek to Kedarnath on foot. Alternatives: Horse/Helicopter/Doli at own cost. Dinner and overnight stay near Kedarnath Temple.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath Darshan → Sonprayag
itinerary.description: Early morning darshan at Kedarnath Temple & Bhairavnath Temple (4:00–7:00 AM). After breakfast, begin the 21km descent to Gauri-Kund. Return to Sonprayag by Jeep. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Sonprayag → Badrinath
itinerary.description: Check out at 5:00 AM. 10-hour bus journey to Badrinath. Visit Shri Badrinath Temple. Dinner at nearby hotel. Overnight stay in Joshimath.

itinerary.title: Badrinath → Rishikesh
itinerary.description: Check out at 5:00 AM. 10-hour journey to Rishikesh. Check in at hotel. Dinner and overnight stay in Rishikesh.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh Sightseeing & Depart
itinerary.description: Check out at 9:00 AM. Adventure activities at Rishikesh (River Rafting etc. at own cost). Sightseeing in Rishikesh. Enroute dinner. Board overnight bus/train towards Delhi.

itinerary.title: Delhi → Board Return Train
itinerary.description: Arrive Delhi at 4:00 AM. Board Punjab Mail (12138) for Mumbai. Rest in train.

itinerary.title: Reach Mumbai
itinerary.description: Reach Mumbai at 8:00 AM. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

title: Rameshwaram Trip
subtitle: Madurai · Rameshwaram · Kanyakumari · Trivandrum
inclusions: Both way SL Train Tickets (3AC upgrade available)
Non-AC Tempo Traveller / Bus for local sightseeing

travel.departure: LTT Mumbai — 8:00 PM, 28 Oct | Pune — 11:30 PM, 28 Oct 2026
travel.arrival: Return: Netravati Exp (16346) for Mumbai | Cape Pune Exp (16382) for Pune

itinerary.title: Board Train
itinerary.description: Board Nagarcoil Express (16339) at LTT Mumbai at 8:00 PM or Pune at 11:30 PM. Overnight train journey to South India.

itinerary.title: Train Journey
itinerary.description: Continue train journey. Relax and prepare for your South India pilgrimage.
itinerary.meals: No Meals (train food at own cost)

itinerary.title: Madurai Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive Madurai at 4:30 AM. After freshening up, visit Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace and the magnificent Meenakshi Amman Temple. Check in and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Rameshwaram Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Dhanushkodi Beach — the meeting point of Bay of Bengal and Indian Ocean. See the APJ Abdul Kalam Memorial House. Seek blessings at Ramanathaswamy Temple (one of the 12 Jyotirlingas & Char Dham). Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Kanyakumari Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Check out and head to Kanyakumari. En route visit Pamban Beach and APJ Abdul Kalam Museum. Visit Kanyakumari Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial. Witness the mesmerising sunset at Sunset Point. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Trivandrum Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Morning breakfast and head to Thiruvananthapuram. En route enjoy Poovar Backwaters (boating at own expense). Visit Sree Anantha Padmanabhaswamy Temple — one of the oldest and richest temples in India. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Depart to Mumbai
itinerary.description: Wake up call. Breakfast. Check out and reach station by 9:00 AM. Board Netravati Exp (16346) for Mumbaikars or Cape Pune Exp (16382) for Punekars. Enjoy the return journey with fellow travellers.

itinerary.title: Reach Mumbai / Pune
itinerary.description: Reach LTT Mumbai by 5:00 PM and Pune station by 9:45 PM. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

title: Nainital – Mussoorie
subtitle: Mussoorie · Rishikesh · Nainital · Jim Corbett · Kainchi Dham
inclusions: Mumbai to Mumbai SL Train Tickets (3AC upgrade available)
Non-AC Tempo Traveller for local sightseeing

itinerary.title: Board Train at Bandra
itinerary.description: Board Bandra Haridwar Express (19019) at Bandra Terminus at 11:00 PM. Overnight journey to Haridwar.

itinerary.title: Train Journey
itinerary.description: Continue train journey. Rest and bond with your travel group.
itinerary.meals: No Meals (train food at own cost)

itinerary.title: Arrive Haridwar → Mussoorie
itinerary.description: Arrive Haridwar at 8:00 AM. Proceed to Mussoorie — the Queen of Hills. Visit the famous Kempty Falls and enjoy the evening at Mall Road. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh Adventure
itinerary.description: Head to Rishikesh — the Yoga Capital of the World. Enjoy thrilling River Rafting on the Ganges. Visit Ram Jhula. Witness the evening Ganga Aarti. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Journey to Nainital via Kainchi Dham
itinerary.description: Breakfast and check out. Journey to Nainital. En route visit Kainchi Dham — a serene spiritual sanctuary and haven for tranquility. Check in at hotel. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Nainital Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Breakfast and sightseeing in Nainital. Seek blessings at Naina Devi Temple. Enjoy boating at Naini Lake (at own cost). Visit Eco Cave Garden. Evening shopping at Mall Road. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Jim Corbett Jungle Safari
itinerary.description: Breakfast and check out. Proceed to Jim Corbett National Park for an adventurous Jeep Safari through India's most renowned wildlife reserve — famed for Bengal tiger sightings and lush landscapes. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Travel to Delhi & Board Train
itinerary.description: Breakfast and check out. Catch the return train from Haridwar Junction by 12:00 PM. Board the overnight train back to Mumbai.

itinerary.title: Reach Mumbai
itinerary.description: Reach Mumbai by 10:15 PM. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

title: Sikkim – Darjeeling
subtitle: Gangtok · Pelling · Darjeeling · Toy Train
priceNote: per person (flight not included — book separately)
flightNote: Suggested flight: Indigo 6E 5305 (BOM 7:50 AM → IXB 10:50 AM) on 03 Sep 2026. Return: Akasa Air QP 1132 (IXB 1:55 PM → BOM 5:05 PM) on 09 Sep 2026. Flights to be booked independently.
inclusions: Xylo/Ertiga/Innova for local sightseeing (AC inactive in hilly areas)

travel.train: Fly to Bagdogra — pickup at airport

itinerary.title: Arrive Bagdogra → Gangtok
itinerary.description: Fly to Bagdogra (IXB). Pickup at airport. Drive to Gangtok — 120 km (approx. 4.5 hrs). Check in at hotel. Evening at leisure to explore MG Marg. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir
itinerary.description: Visit Tsomgo Lake at 12,400 ft — a glacial lake of stunning beauty. Proceed to New Baba Mandir at 13,200 ft. Optional visit to Nathula Pass at 14,500 ft (India-China border; own cost). Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Gangtok → Pelling via Namchi
itinerary.description: Check out and drive to Pelling. En route visit Siddheswar Dham at Namchi — a grand pilgrimage complex. Check in at hotel. Dinner and overnight stay in Pelling.

itinerary.title: Pelling Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Orange Garden, Rimbi Waterfalls, Pemayangtse Monastery (one of the oldest monasteries in Sikkim), Rabdantse Ruins, and Pelling Sky Walk. Enjoy Ropeway (ticket included). Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Pelling → Darjeeling
itinerary.description: Breakfast and check out. Drive to Darjeeling — 80 km (approx. 4 hrs). Check in at hotel. Enjoy the famous Toy Train ride: Darjeeling–Ghum–Darjeeling (at own cost; prior booking mandatory). Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Wake up at 4:00 AM for the spectacular sunrise from Tiger Hill (2,590m). Visit Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, Padmaja Naidu Zoological Park (closed Thursdays), Tenzing Rock, Tibetan Refugee Self-help Centre (closed Sundays), and Tea Garden (Chitrey outer view). Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Return Journey
itinerary.description: Packed breakfast and check out. Drive from Darjeeling to Bagdogra Airport (IXB). Board return flight to Mumbai. Return Home with Sweet Memories!

travel.arrival: Return: Patliputra-Mumbai LTT SF Express (12142), Arrive Mumbai 3:00 PM, 01 Oct 2026

itinerary.title: Board Train at LTT Mumbai
itinerary.description: Board Jaynagar Pawan Express (11061) at LTT at 10:00 AM. Overnight journey to Varanasi.

itinerary.title: Arrive Varanasi — Ganga Aarti
itinerary.description: Arrive Varanasi at 1:00 PM. Check in and freshen up. Evening: witness the grand Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat — one of the most spectacular spiritual experiences in India. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Kashi Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Early morning 5:00 AM darshan at the sacred Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Visit Kalbhairav Temple and Devi Annapoorna Temple. Explore the ancient ghats of Varanasi. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Ayodhya Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Early morning departure to Ayodhya. Visit the magnificent Ram Janmbhoomi and Ram Mandir. Seek blessings at Hanuman Gadhi. Take a holy dip and witness aarti at Saryu River. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Prayagraj — Triveni Sangam
itinerary.description: Head to Prayagraj. Visit Triveni Sangam — the sacred confluence of Ganga, Yamuna, and the invisible Saraswati. Seek blessings at Bade Hanumanji Temple. Board the return train to Mumbai.

itinerary.title: Arrive Mumbai
itinerary.description: Arrive Mumbai at 3:00 PM via Patliputra-Mumbai LTT SF Express (12142). Return Home with Sweet Memories!

title: Ujjain – Indore – Omkareshwar
subtitle: Indore · Omkareshwar Jyotirlinga · Mahakaleshwar · Mahakal Corridor

travel.departure: Pune Jn. — 2:45 PM, 25 Jun 2026 | Kalyan Jn. — 5:30 PM, 25 Jun 2026
travel.arrival: Return: 28 Jun evening, Arrive home 29 Jun

itinerary.title: Board Train
itinerary.description: Board train at Pune Jn. at 2:45 PM or Kalyan Jn. at 5:30 PM. Overnight journey to Indore.

itinerary.title: Indore Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive Indore. Check in and freshen up. Explore Indore: Rajwada (historic palace), Lal Baug Palace, Kaanch Mandir (Glass Temple), Khajrana Ganesh Temple. Evening at the famous 56 Bhog Street Food Market. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Omkareshwar & Mahakal Corridor
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Omkareshwar Jyotirlinga — one of the 12 sacred Jyotirlingas located on an island shaped like the OM symbol. Evening: stroll through the magnificent Mahakal Corridor in Ujjain. Check in at hotel in Ujjain. Dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Ujjain Sightseeing & Depart
itinerary.description: Visit Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga — one of the 12 Jyotirlingas with the famous Bhasma Aarti. Visit Kalbhairav Temple, Harsiddhi Mata Temple, Maharishi Sandipani Ashram, and Mangalnath Temple. Board the return train in the evening.

itinerary.title: Arrive Home
itinerary.description: Arrive at home station in the morning. Return Home with Sweet Memories!
